videos.title: Mister Negative Life Swapping
videos.description:
It would be a shame if I lowered all of my health and then used Mister Negative to swap our health totals ....

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-mister-negative-life-swapping
